page_content: Title Ancient Myths and Modern Lives Approaches to Greek Mythology Select three courses of the following, two of which must be at the 3xx CLAS320 Women in Classical Antiquity CLAS330 Ancient Greek Religion: Gods, Myths, Temples CLAS331 Roman Religion: From Jupiter to Jesus CLAS374 Greek Tragedy in Translation CLAS419 The Classical Tradition Credits 3 3 9
